data.title: UK Crypto Licensing Gateway to Open September 2026, FCA Confirms
data.description:
The UK’s financial regulator has outlined a clear timeline for bringing crypto firms into a full licensing regime, setting September 2026 as the opening of a formal application gateway. The move marks a decisive step toward replacing interim registrations with a comprehensive authorization framework.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/uk-crypto-licensing-gateway-to-open-september-2026-fca-confirms/

data.title: GM joins list of automakers pulling back from EVs on Trump policies, fading demand
data.description:

Weeks ago, Ford Motor also revealed an even larger $19. 5 billion charge for […]

data.title: Bitcoin Reclaims $90K as Strong U.S Jobs Data Fuels $100K Push
data.description:
Bitcoin rallied from $89,200 to $92,000 over six hours following Bureau of Labor Statistics data showing 50,000 nonfarm payroll additions and unemployment declining to 4. 4%, with crypto analyst Bitbull projecting $103,000-$105,000 targets within 3-4 weeks as Polymarket odds reach 97% for Fed rate hold at January 28 meeting.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-reclaims-90k-as-strong-u-s-jobs-data-fuels-100k-push/

data.title: FBI says North Korea’s Kimsuky APT uses malicious QR codes to spearphish U.S. entities
data.description:
The FBI says Kimsuky APT, a North Korean state-backed hacking group, is using malicious QR codes to break into U. S. organizations linked to North Korea policy. The warning came in a 2025 FBI FLASH shared with NGOs, think tanks, universities, and government-connected groups. The agency says the targets all share one thing. They study, advise […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/north-korea-kimsuky-apt-malicious-qr-codes/

data.title: U.S. Employment Growth Remains Moderate Amid Economic Concerns
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve's Barkin stated that the latest employment data indicates moderate job growth, with a persistently sluggish hiring environment. Data from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics revealed that employers added 50,000 jobs last month, while the unemployment rate slightly decreased to 4.4%. Barkin highlighted that the balance between moderate job growth and labor supply continues, but there is a need to monitor the risks of rising unemployment and persistent inflation.
